insecureContext: Voice needs a secure page (https or localhost). This page isn't a secure context, so the browser blocks the microphone.
audioDevice: The audio device could not start. Another app may be using the microphone, or it was disconnected — close other apps using it, replug it, then try again. (This is not caused by a self-signed certificate.)
driverUnavailable: No speech-to-text backend is configured or reachable.
autoModeIdleOff: Voice conversation turned off after inactivity.
modelLoadFailed: The local voice model could not be loaded.
